# brevo_webhook (Resource)

Manages a webhook in Brevo.



<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `events` (List of String) Events triggering the webhook.
- `type` (String) Type of the webhook (transactional or marketing).
- `url` (String) URL of the webhook.

### Optional

- `batched` (Boolean) Whether to send batched webhooks.
- `description` (String) Description of the webhook.
- `domain` (String) Inbound domain of webhook, required for inbound event type.

### Read-Only

- `id` (Number) Numeric identifier of the webhook.
